sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63265" key="liknofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λικνο-φορέω</orth>, <sense id="n63265.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry the sacred</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίκνον</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
